optical.config.title: Optical Configuration
optical.freelook.option.invert.desc: Enable to look down when pulling mouse down.
optical.freelook.option.toggle_mode.desc: Choose whether to press the key or hold it to toggle.
optical.freelook.option.limit.desc: Limit how far the camera can rotate around the player.
optical.brightness.option.enabled.desc: Turns the entire Brightness module on or off.
optical.brightness.option.default.desc: The normal brightness level (100% is vanilla's default).
optical.brightness.option.toggled.desc: The brightness level used when the toggle key is active.
optical.brightness.option.step.desc: How much brightness changes per key press.
optical.brightness.option.update_toggle_: While toggled on, key adjustments update the saved toggled gamma.
optical.brightness.option.show_message.d: Show the active brightness percentage when changed.
optical.freecam.option.enabled.desc: Toggle detached freecam mode on and off.
optical.freecam.option.invert.desc: Enable to look down when pulling mouse down.
Start freecam with momentum mode enabled.
optical.freecam.option.momentum_smoothin: How quickly velocity approaches target speed in momentum mode.
How much momentum remains when releasing movement keys.
optical.zoom.option.enabled.desc: Turns zoom in and out with the zoom keybind.
optical.zoom.option.scroll.desc: Use the mouse wheel while zooming to change zoom steps.
optical.zoom.option.default_strength.des: Primary zoom strength. Ranges from 1x to 4x in 1x increments.
optical.zoom.option.zoom_in_seconds.desc: Seconds to ease into zoom (0.1s to 5.0s).
optical.zoom.option.zoom_out_seconds.des: Seconds to ease out of zoom (0.1s to 5.0s).
optical.zoom.option.secondary_strength.d: Final strength reached by the secondary zoom animation.
optical.zoom.option.scroll_step_count.de: Maximum number of scroll steps up or down from the base zoom.
optical.zoom.option.zoom_per_step.desc: Multiplier applied for each scroll step.
optical.zoom.option.scroll_smoothness.de: How smooth scroll-driven zoom transitions feel (0% to 100%).
optical.zoom.option.remember_steps.desc: Keep scroll step offsets after zoom is released.
optical.zoom.option.secondary_zoom_in_se: Seconds secondary zoom takes to animate in (0.1s to 60.0s).
optical.zoom.option.secondary_zoom_out_s: Seconds secondary zoom takes to animate out (0.1s to 60.0s).
optical.zoom.option.zoom_in_transition.d: Choose how zoom-in transitions are applied.
Choose how zoom-out transitions are applied.
